TypeSignature.Value: .class public sequential ansi sealed beforefieldinit SKFourByteTag extends System.ValueType implements class System.IEquatable`1<valuetype SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag>

Docs.summary: Represents a four-byte tag value used to identify font features, variation axes, and color-space tables.

Docs.param: The tag to compare with the current tag.

Docs.summary: Returns the hash code for this tag.

MemberSignature.Value: public static SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag Parse (string? tag);
.method public static hidebysig valuetype SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag Parse(string tag) cil managed

Docs.param: The string to parse. If or empty, the returned tag has a packed value of zero. Strings shorter than four characters are right-padded with spaces; strings longer than four characters are truncated.
Docs.summary: Parses a string into an , padding with spaces or truncating as needed.
Docs.returns: An whose four bytes correspond to the first four characters of , padded with spaces as necessary.

MemberSignature.Value: public override string ToString ();
.method public hidebysig virtual instance string ToString() cil managed

Docs.summary: Returns the four-character string representation of this tag.
Docs.returns: A four-character string whose characters correspond to the four bytes of the packed tag value, from most-significant to least-significant byte.
